About Me

Who Am I?

I am a passionate technology enthusiast with a strong foundation in data science, machine learning, and full-stack development. My journey in tech is driven by curiosity and a constant desire to learn and grow. Currently pursuing B.Tech Computer Science & Engineering at Lovely Professional University, Punjab, I have developed practical expertise across multiple domains — from building high-accuracy ML models to crafting interactive dashboards and responsive web applications.

My Approach

I believe in combining technical expertise with creative problem-solving. Whether it's developing software, analysing data, or building web applications, I approach each challenge with attention to detail and a focus on delivering the best possible results. My methodology includes:

  • ▸ Thorough analysis and planning before implementation
  • ▸ Writing clean, maintainable, and efficient code
  • ▸ Rigorous testing and model evaluation
  • ▸ Continuous learning and self-improvement
  • ▸ Collaboration and knowledge sharing

Technical Expertise

My technical skills span across multiple domains of technology, allowing me to work on end-to-end data and development projects:

  • ▸ Programming Languages: Python, Java, C++, JavaScript
  • ▸ Web Development: ReactJs, NodeJs, HTML5, CSS3
  • ▸ Data Science & ML: Pandas, NumPy, Seaborn, Scikit-learn, Matplotlib
  • ▸ Databases: MySQL, MongoDB, PostgreSQL
  • ▸ Tools & Platforms: Git, GitHub, Power BI, Jupyter Notebook, Linux, Excel

Beyond Work

When I'm not coding or analysing data, you can find me:

  • ▸ Playing strategic games like chess to sharpen problem-solving skills
  • ▸ Enjoying cricket matches and analysing game strategies
  • ▸ Exploring new technologies, frameworks, and tools
  • ▸ Contributing to open-source projects on GitHub
  • ▸ Reading tech blogs and staying updated with industry trends

My Values

I believe in:

  • ▸ Continuous learning and self-improvement
  • ▸ Writing clean, maintainable, and efficient code
  • ▸ User-centric design and development
  • ▸ Ethical and responsible use of technology
  • ▸ Building sustainable and scalable solutions

Career Goals

My professional aspirations include:

  • ▸ Contributing to innovative and impactful data science & ML projects
  • ▸ Developing expertise in emerging AI and machine learning technologies
  • ▸ Building solutions that make a real, positive difference
  • ▸ Growing as a full-stack developer and data professional
  • ▸ Mentoring and helping others grow in their tech careers

Work Experience

Data Science Summer Training
Data to Insights Program
Jun 2025 – Jul 2025
📍 Online · 6 Weeks · Certified
  • Completed intensive program covering SQL, Excel, Python, Machine Learning, and Power BI with real-world dataset analysis.
  • Applied 15+ SQL operations, 20+ Excel functions, and Python libraries (pandas, seaborn, scikit-learn) to derive insights.
  • Implemented Linear Regression, Decision Tree, Random Forest — achieving up to 0.77 R² with feature engineering.
  • Designed interactive Power BI dashboards using KPI cards, maps, model outputs, and trend charts.
Responsive Web Design
FreeCodeCamp
Sep 2024
📍 Online · Certified
  • Completed comprehensive curriculum covering HTML5, CSS3, Flexbox, CSS Grid, and responsive design principles.
  • Built multiple fully responsive web projects demonstrating proficiency in modern front-end development techniques.
  • Applied best practices for accessibility, semantic HTML, and cross-browser compatibility.
The Bits and Bytes of Computer Networking
Coursera · Google
Sep 2024
📍 Online · Certified
  • Completed Google's networking course covering TCP/IP model, DNS, DHCP, VPNs, and cloud networking fundamentals.
  • Learned network troubleshooting methodologies and practical tools for diagnosing connectivity issues.
  • Gained understanding of IPv4/IPv6 addressing, subnetting, routing protocols, and network security basics.

Air Quality Predictive Project
2025
